tech_news.title: DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! coming to PC on June 29 - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Sting will release sugoroku RPG bundle DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! for PC via Steam on June 29, the developer announced. It will only support Japanese as a language option.

tech_news.title: Dragon's Dogma 2 discontinues deluxe edition - and withdraws many of its controversial time-saving microtransaction - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Capcom is discontinuing the deluxe edition of Dragon's Dogma 2 on 24th June, as well as pulling many of its more controversial time-saving microtransactions.
